text:
Further hints: when entering in the firefox url bar about:support
the whole table is empty no data fields are printed.

This output appears in the terminal:
JavaScript warning: resource://gre/modules/Troubleshoot.sys.mjs, line 710: WebGL context was lost.
JavaScript warning: resource://gre/modules/Troubleshoot.sys.mjs, line 710: WebGL context was lost.
W: [(null)] caps.c: Normally all extra capabilities would be dropped now, but that's impossible because PulseAudio was built without capabilities support.
JavaScript error: , line 0: NS_ERROR_UNEXPECTED
